_README: Tlamatini Contacts book. Add the people you message here, then you can just say 'send a WhatsApp / Telegram to <name> ...' and Tlamatini resolves the handle for you. Fields: name (required), aliases (other names that should resolve to this person), telegram (@username, a +countrycode phone, or a numeric id), whatsapp (phone with country code, e.g. +5215555555555), email (optional). This file is USER STATE: it lives next to config.json and is preserved across updates. Do NOT commit real phone numbers to a public repo.

contacts.name: Angela
contacts.note: Owner. telegram is the NUMERIC chat id (instant — no @username lookup needed).

contacts.name: Ana Ricardo Lazcano
contacts.note: EXAMPLE contact with placeholder handles — replace with a real person or delete.
